Class Calendar

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.Calendar
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICalendar
public class Calendar extends Object implements ICalendar
Screen Controller for Calendar Shows diary notes and venue availability
Version:
4.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Meer Ali, Neil Daya

    • isVenueAvailable

      public boolean isVenueAvailable(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, String venueName)
      Returns true if the venue is available between the given time frame
      Specified by:
      isVenueAvailable in interface ICalendar
      Parameters:
      start - start of the time frame
      end - end of the time frame
      venueName - name of the venue to check availability for
      Returns:
